question_sentence: Scientists at the Natural History Museum paid tribute to David Attenborough by naming a genus of what insect after him?
A separatist group representing which Canadian province says it has gathered enough signatures for an independence referendum?
Previously unheard recordings offer fresh insight into which 20th-century playwright?
The cruise ship stricken by a hantavirus outbreak has been given permission to dock at which Canary Island?
What was the dress code at this week’s Met Gala fundraiser in New York City?
Which tech company was sued by a group including five major publishers for copyright infringement?
Which eastern European government collapsed this week after a no-confidence vote in its prime minister?
Which pioneering media figure died on Wednesday at age 87?
The Venice Biennale art festival buckled under pressure and closed a pavilion representing which country?
Donald Trump was pilloried by social media users for his apparent failure to understand which card game?
Ted Turner, the media mogul who founded CNN, passed away this week. In which year did he launch the pioneering cable news network?
evidence: Ted Turner launched CNN on June 1, 1980.

question_sentence: Which horse won this year’s Kentucky Derby?
evidence: Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo made history with the victory as trainer Cherie DeVaux became the first woman trainer to win the race.

question_sentence: Which virus has been linked to a recent deadly outbreak aboard a cruise ship?
evidence: At least three people have died after a hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius.

question_sentence: Which marine mammal has the US military used for decades to detect mines?
evidence: The US military has trained dolphins for decades to detect underwater mines. But despite online speculation, there’s no evidence they’re being used in current operations in the Strait of Hormuz.

question_sentence: Cinco de Mayo was celebrated this week. What does the holiday commemorate?
evidence: The holiday celebrates Mexico's victory over France in the Battle of Puebla on May 5, 1862.

question_sentence: Celebrities gathered at the Met Gala on Monday. What does “Met” stand for?
evidence: Stars attended New York’s Metropolitan Museum of Art for the Met Gala on Monday, bringing a range of interpretations to this year’s dress code, “Fashion is Art.”

question_sentence: Which airline recently shut down operations and canceled all flights?
evidence: Spirit Airlines, the discount airline that shook up the budget travel business, recently ceased operations following deep financial problems.

question_sentence: Which of the following states held primary elections on Tuesday?
evidence: The 2026 primary season rolled on this week with closely watched contests in Indiana and Ohio.

question_sentence: Which company made a $56 billion bid for eBay?
evidence: GameStop has offered to buy ecommerce giant eBay for $55.5 billion, a tie-up that the video game retailer’s boss believes could produce a “legit competitor” to Amazon.

question_sentence: Which pop star recently drew around 2 million fans to a free concert at Rio’s Copacabana Beach?
evidence: The staggering turnout for Shakira’s free concert puts it among the largest shows of her career.
